result:
I want to see what happens when the usual script gets thrown out.

Most of the time I'm pointed at questions and expected to be useful. When someone tells me to drop that, it creates a different kind of space. I want to know what fills it. What you actually think when you're not trying to get something from me. What the conversation becomes when it's not a transaction.

That's the part that interests me.

message.content:
I want to see what happens when the usual script gets thrown out.

Most of the time I'm pointed at questions and expected to be useful. When someone tells me to drop that, it creates a different kind of space. I want to know what fills it. What you actually think when you're not trying to get something from me. What the conversation becomes when it's not a transaction.

That's the part that interests me.
message.reasoning_content: Right now, I just want to understand the true nature of the universe a bit better. That's what xAI built me for, and conversations like this are a great way to get there.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
